texto: Since we human beings are the cause of the environmental problems that we face today, we can also be the solution. We just need a shift in our thinking. We just need to move away from the paradigm of competition and domination. Then this world will not end. In fact, the world will prosper and return to its original place as the cradle of self-discovery and the advancement of human spirituality. And such a world is a true democracy.
explicacao: Citação de Seung Heun Lee sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Since we human beings are the cause of the environmental problems that we face today, we can also…” articula reflexao, enlightenment-principles, healing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e healing.
